sigma_cutoff.method: spectral cutoff with 8 scheme variations across m_Xi^2 in [0.10, 10.0]

convergence_check.spread_definitions: spread_absolute_band_aware uses sigma-cutoff band-min 1.3993 (full-precision, m_Xi^2=10) not the central value 1.407; spread_absolute_central_values uses the four representative central values 1.4190, 1.4070, 1.4187, 1.4190 (max-min across the four paths). The manuscript reports 0.012 (central-value spread) in Section 4.

qualifications.msbar_vs_tree_normalization: Tree-only |g|_tree = 1.66 (before msbar healing). Heal factor 0.8543 from sigma-cutoff regularization. Consumers requesting tree-normalized g must use 1.66; msbar-normalized consumers use 1.4187.
qualifications.lattice_normalization_separate: Lattice cross-checks at a different normalization (g_explicit=1.25 in the CTP slice, N=30 lattice) are reported separately and should not be naively co-averaged with the FL-S4-bounce-msbar paths.

two_loop_residual_correction.formula: delta_v/v = D_1 + cos(theta_em)*(D_2+D_3) with theta_em=pi from the T-parity source axiom

epistemic_status.msbar_scheme_independence: closed-form vs full-msbar agree at 1.42 vs 1.4187 (0.02% spread)
open_subleadings: RG running of c2_mixed from m_phi to m_Z
Subleading O(R^2/m^4) curvature corrections via a_4 coefficient
